description_long: A male security guard stands upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, wearing a black short-sleeve shirt adorned with a white insignia on the chest and a visible lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. His shirt is paired with dark blue or black pants and black shoes, giving him a professional and standardized appearance. The guard has short, light-colored hair and a trimmed beard, and his forearms are marked with black wristbands or gloves. The shirt fits closely, and the pants are straight-legged, contributing to a neat, uniformed look. The lanyard and badge are prominent, suggesting official identification. The overall build is average, and the figure appears alert and ready for duty.
description: A male security guard in a black uniform with a white chest insignia, lanyard, and ID badge, standing upright with arms outstretched. He wears dark pants, black shoes, and has short light hair and a beard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guard's face, chest insignia, lanyard with badge, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and the back of the head with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the guard's profile, arm, and the side of the lanyard and badge.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a standardized black short-sleeve shirt with a white insignia on the chest, paired with dark blue or black straight-legged pants and black shoes. A lanyard with a visible ID badge hangs around the neck, and black wristbands or gloves are worn on both forearms. The uniform is formal and professional, with no hat or tie present, and the shirt fits closely to the body.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, displaying an alert and ready demeanor.
